_meta.description: Base rate data for Nepali BFIs. To update monthly: append a new {date, rate} object to the FRONT of each institution's history array (most recent first). The website automatically picks history[0] as the current rate.
_meta.date_format: BS year-month, e.g. 2083-01 = Baisakh 2083 (months 01-12 map to Baisakh..Chaitra)
